name: EZPAWN
description_short: EZPAWN is a pawn shop offering collateral-based loans, retail resale of pre-owned merchandise, gold/jewelry buying, and firearms services at their Las Vegas location.
description_long:
EZPAWN operates as a traditional pawn shop with a physical location at 1501 East Charleston Boulevard in Las Vegas, Nevada. The company has built its business model around providing quick cash loans secured by personal property, along with retail sales of pre-owned items and precious metals buying services. Their Las Vegas store is open Monday-Friday 9am-7pm, Saturday 9am-7pm, and Sunday 12pm-5pm, making them accessible during extended hours for customer convenience.

The company offers multiple financial and retail services centered on collateral-based lending. Customers can pawn items in working condition to receive immediate cash loans, purchase discounted pre-owned brand-name merchandise (25-70% off retail), sell gold and diamond jewelry for cash, and access firearm loans and sales at this location. They provide layaway options with 10% down and flexible monthly payments, "Take Today" payment plans through third-party partners (up to 12 months depending on eligibility), and an online instant quote tool for electronics valuation. EZPAWN also operates an online shop and offers product protection plans for electronics and jewelry VIP membership programs with benefits like guaranteed loan amounts and free jewelry services.

EZPAWN distinguishes itself through its EZ+ Rewards Program, which allows customers to manage pawns, layaways, and rewards online while earning EZ Points on eligible transactions. The company emphasizes expert evaluation of items (particularly firearms and precious metals), secure on-site storage for pawned firearms, and daily inventory rotation of retail merchandise. Their instant quote technology for electronics and transparent fee-based loan structure position them as modernizing the traditional pawn model while maintaining community presence and personalized service.

The primary limitation is that EZPAWN operates as a lender of last resort with pawn loans subject to terms, conditions, and fees that are not fully disclosed on the website. Customers must visit in-person to learn specific loan terms, interest rates, and fee structures. Online payment capabilities are explicitly unavailable in Arizona, Oregon, and Pennsylvania, and many specialized services (firearms loans, certain payment options) are location-dependent with availability varying by store.
pros: Instant Quote tool provides real-time electronics valuations online before visiting the store
Extended store hours (open Sundays 12pm-5pm, weekdays until 7pm) provide accessibility for working customers
EZ+ Rewards Program allows online management of pawns, layaways, and payments from anywhere
Expert gold and diamond jewelry buyers with testing procedures to ensure fair pricing
Secure on-site firearm storage facility for pawned guns with proper handling protocols
Daily new inventory rotation ensures constantly changing selection of pre-owned merchandise
Flexible payment options including layaway (10% down) and Take Today plans (up to 12+ months)
cons: Pawn loan terms, interest rates, and fee structures are not disclosed online; must visit store in-person to learn specific costs
Online payments not available in Arizona, Oregon, or Pennsylvania, limiting digital convenience for those state residents
Firearm redemption requires background checks and is subject to additional unstated conditions; appraisal amounts are at sole discretion of each location
Many services are location-dependent ('Not all services are available in all areas'), so advertised offerings may not apply to all EZPAWN locations
As a pawn lender, this is inherently a high-cost borrowing option compared to traditional personal loans or credit lines
best_for: Individuals needing quick cash who own valuable items (electronics, jewelry, firearms, tools) and prefer collateral-based loans over credit-based lending
Budget-conscious shoppers seeking deeply discounted pre-owned brand-name merchandise (25-70% off retail)
People looking to sell gold, diamonds, or jewelry for immediate cash without lengthy appraisal processes
Customers who value flexible payment options like layaway or extended payment plans without traditional credit approval
diagnosis: EZPAWN is best for consumers who own valuable collateral and need quick cash without credit checks, or budget shoppers seeking heavily discounted pre-owned merchandise. The critical caveat is that specific loan terms, interest rates, fees, and APR information are not publicly disclosed—customers must visit in-person to understand the true cost of borrowing, making it essential to compare rates before committing to a pawn loan.
services: Pawn loans on items in working condition with immediate cash disbursement
Gold and diamond jewelry buying with expert testing and evaluation
Firearm loans and firearm purchases with secure on-site storage
Retail sales of pre-owned electronics, tools, gaming equipment, jewelry, and brand-name merchandise
Online instant quote tool for electronics valuation
Layaway program with 10% down and flexible monthly payments
Take Today payment plans through third-party partners (up to 12+ months depending on credit eligibility)
EZ+ Rewards Program with online account management and points accumulation
Product Protection Plans for electronics and other merchandise
Jewelry VIP membership program with guaranteed loan amounts and trade-up benefits
Online shop with daily new arrivals and browsing capability
Pawn extension and layaway online payments (except Arizona, Oregon, Pennsylvania)
